## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not attach personal photos or videos.
- [ ] I did not attach a real `ProcessedFiles.json`.
- [ ] I sanitized private paths from logs.
- [ ] I ran DryRun first, or this issue explains why that was impossible.

- Windows version:

- UDMRS build:
- Operation mode: DryRun / Apply
- Provider, if any: None / Google Takeout / XMP Sidecar

Describe the behavior.

Describe what you expected.
